channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tsunami warning issued after strong earthquake of magnitude 7.7 strikes northern Japan
item.description: Japanese authorities issued a warning following a powerful earthquake that struck the northern part of the country, with reports indicating a magnitude of around 7.7. The seismic event prompted immedi...

item.title: Two killed and several injured after shooting follows planned fight at North Carolina park
item.description: At least two people have died and several others have been injured following a shooting incident at Leinbach Park in Winston-Salem, North Carolina, which authorities say began as a planned fight. Acco...

item.title: Farm groups oppose possible GM farm imports in India-US trade talks
item.description: A coalition of farmers and civil society organisations has written to the Central Government asking it not to allow imports of genetically modified agricultural products from the United States, includ...

item.title: Scientists explain and replicate dolomite formation by removing growth defects
item.description: Scientists from the University of Michigan and Hokkaido University have resolved a long-standing geological mystery known as the “Dolomite Problem,” which puzzled researchers for over 200 years. Dolom...

item.title: MQM-P MNA’s 19-year-old daughter killed by stray bullet in Karachi’s Gulshan-i-Iqbal
item.description: A tragic incident in Karachi’s Gulshan-i-Iqbal area has resulted in the death of a 19-year-old medical student, who was the daughter of a Muttahida Qaumi Movement-Pakistan (MQM-P) Member of the Nation...

item.title: Tensions rise as US seizes Iranian vessel while key Philippine and global issues unfold
item.description: The latest news roundup highlights growing geopolitical tensions alongside major developments in the Philippines. A fragile ceasefire between the United States and Iran is now under threat after US fo...

item.title: Firmus showcases data centre strategy in detailed ASX IPO investor roadshow
item.description: Firmus, a data centre company backed by major global investors including Nvidia and Blackstone, is actively preparing for a significant initial public offering on the Australian Securities Exchange (A...

item.title: No Lotto Jackpot Winners Announced for April 20 Draws
item.description: Walang nanalo ng jackpot sa mga pangunahing lotto draws ng Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) nitong Lunes, Abril 20. Para sa Megalotto 6/45, walang nakahula ng tamang kombinasyon na 34-12-2...

item.title: Reactions trail Gbajabiamila’s comment urging lawmaker to remain in ADC amid party crisis
item.description: There has been serious public reaction following comments made by the Chief of Staff to President Bola Tinubu, Femi Gbajabiamila, at a social event in Abuja. Gbajabiamila, a former Speaker of the Hous...

item.title: Uncertainty surrounds planned US delegation to Pakistan for potential Iran peace talks
item.description: Plans for a new round of diplomatic talks involving the United States and Iran remain uncertain, despite earlier claims by former President Donald Trump that Vice President JD Vance was already en rou...

item.title: Gunmen kill commercial driver and abduct passengers on Benin–Lagos highway in Edo State
item.description: Reports coming from Edo State confirm a serious security incident along the Benin–Lagos Highway, where armed men suspected to be kidnappers attacked a commercial bus belonging to GUO Transport. The in...

item.title: Kariakoo Expansion: Safety Risks and Regulatory Challenges Persist
item.description: The bustling Kariakoo commercial district in Dar es Salaam is experiencing rapid growth and transformation, with developers building upwards to meet increasing demand for retail and office space. Howe...

item.title: Deepfakes and Digital Fraud Targeting Public Institutions Raise New Cybersecurity Challenges
item.description: The article discusses how deepfakes and digital scams are becoming a major cybersecurity threat for public institutions in Mexico, positioning themselves as a critical challenge in the country’s 2026 ...

item.title: Ruto Links High Fuel Prices to Kenya’s Economic Status and Road Development Costs
item.description: President William Ruto has defended the high cost of fuel in Kenya, saying it is tied to the country’s economic position and ongoing infrastructure development. Speaking at a church service in Karen, ...

item.title: Pope Leo criticises global oppression and exploitation during Angola pastoral visit
item.description: During his ongoing Africa tour, Pope Leo delivered a strong message in Angola, condemning what he described as widespread exploitation by authoritarian leaders and wealthy elites. Speaking during a Ma...

item.title: Greenpeace Installs Mock Wind Turbines on Trump Turnberry Golf Course in Protest
item.description: Greenpeace activists carried out a demonstration at President Donald Trump's Turnberry golf resort in South Ayrshire, Scotland. Three campaigners placed six mock wind turbines on the fourth hole green...

item.title: Community sets up memorial for eight children killed in Louisiana tragedy
item.description: Isang makeshift memorial ang itinayo ng mga residente sa labas ng isang bahay sa Louisiana kung saan walong bata ang nasawi sa isang malagim na insidente. Ayon sa ulat, nagtipon ang komunidad upang ma...

item.title: Concerns raised over attendees with China ties at Liberal fundraiser hosted by Mark Carney
item.description: A Liberal Party fundraiser attended by Prime Minister Mark Carney in the Toronto area has drawn scrutiny after reports that several attendees had connections to organizations aligned with the Chinese ...

item.title: Security Forces Kill Two Terrorists Including Ring Leader in Bannu Intelligence-Based Operation
item.description: According to the Inter-Services Public Relations (ISPR), security forces conducted an intelligence-based operation (IBO) in the Bannu district of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa on April 19, following reports of t...

item.title: Goodwill Edmonton Highlights Weekly Finds and Community Impact Through Thrift Shopping
item.description: This brief sponsored content piece highlights Goodwill’s ongoing efforts in Edmonton, focusing on both its retail offerings and its social mission. The article emphasizes that Goodwill thrift stores r...
